description: Agent skills and plugin bundles from synapseradio/ai-skills: the thinkies reasoning toolkit and the de-residency German-bureaucracy coach.
name: ai-skills

plugins.description: Reasoning toolkit of 48 skills — decomposition, questioning, assumption excavation, perspective shifts, decision analysis, ideation, synthesis, and epistemic integrity checks. Installed skills invoke as /thinkies:<name>.
plugins.name: thinkies

plugins.description: Conversational coach for non-EU expats preparing for German government appointments — visa, residency, citizenship. Researches every claim live and cites each factual statement with a URL.
plugins.name: de-residency
